shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Ontario innovation grants and tax credits. Access $3.2B+ through Ontario Innovation Tax Credit (10% OITC), Jobs and Prosperity Fund, OCE programs, and advanced manufacturing support. Funding available: up to $3.2B+.
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Ontario Innovation Grants & Tax Credits  | OITC 10% Tax Credit | .2B+ R&D Funding in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Ontario Innovation Grants & Tax Credits  | OITC 10% Tax Credit | .2B+ R&D Funding?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $3.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Stack with SR&ED
expertTip.content: The Ontario Innovation Tax Credit (OITC) stacks with federal SR&ED. You can claim both on the same R&D expenses for maximum benefit.
